question: Reason for your recommendation
description: Highlight why you think this supplier can provide higher-quality recycled materials or can produce cosmetic parts with higher aspect ratio

question: Value chain
description: Consumer part provider: companies that can make premium-looking finished metal housings

question: Name
description: Hyperlink to company website. For university suppliers add the name of the research group.

question: Founded year
description: Not required for universities

question: Number of employees
description: Not required for universities

question: Technology / Product name
description: Hyperlink to technology page. Can be raw materials or a display component.

question: Market status
description: On the market and to be launched are the priority. Under development technologies can be added only if very innovative and not yet on the market.

question: Launched year
description: If still in development write /. If a tentative launch date is known include the year e.g. 2027 (tentative).

question: Description of the technology
description: Brief description of the technology. Maximum 3-4 sentences.

question: % Recycled content
description: At least 15%. e.g. 75%

question: Grades of titanium
description: Preferred TA2 and TC4. e.g. TA2 and TC4

question: Composition
description: e.g. 75% recycled aluminium + 24% aluminium + 1% other

question: Recommended Manufacturing Routes
description: Identify the manufacturing methods recommended by the supplier for cosmetic applications. e.g. Recommended for CNC machining and forged cosmetic components.

question: Surface Finish Compatibility
description: Identify which cosmetic surface finishing processes are compatible with the material and whether any cosmetic finish limitations are reported. e.g. Compatible with anodizing, polishing, brushing, and bead blasting with good cosmetic consistency.

question: Surface Appearance
description: It should be smooth and uniform

question: Offering Format
description: List all relevant formats offered. e.g. resin, pellet, powder, foil, or ingot. Filaments are out of scope.

question: Thickness Availability
description: Multiple thickness options are required

question: Defect(s)
description: Should be free from defects

question: Tensile Strength (MPa)
description: Reference: Virgin PCTG is 45-65 MPa

question: Customization
description: Can the company customize the product according to client needs?

question: Recycled content (%)
description: e.g. 50%. Write / if not applicable.

question: Waste Type
description: e.g. post-industrial, pre-consumer

question: Waste source
description: e.g. industrial stamping scrap and post-consumer can waste

question: Targeted Applications
description: List applications claimed by the company. Be concise. e.g. E-vape (Mouthpieces, secondary Packaging), Automotive (chair). Focus on applications in electronics and display for tobacco.

question: Collaboration
description: Any partner that helped develop the technology?

question: Users
description: Customers or brands currently using the material. Indicate brand name and what they use the material for.

question: Use Cases in E-Cigarettes or Premium Consumer Electronics
description: Identify whether the supplier or material has been used in e-cigarettes, vape devices, or premium consumer electronics involving appearance-critical metal components. e.g. Supplier reports use in anodized vape device housings and premium consumer electronics enclosures.

question: Traceability
description: e.g. Traceability assured by ISCC certification

question: Certificates
description: Any certifications related to materials including sustainability, recycled content, traceability, mass balance. e.g. GRS certificate

question: Patent
description: Yes or No. If yes, list 1-2 most notable patents related to the technology. e.g. EP0209882A2

question: Recycling Method
description: Multiple options allowed. e.g. Chemical, Mechanical, Thermal. Write / if not relevant to recycling.

question: Recycling Method Subtype
description: Multiple options allowed. Only add a new option if it is a genuinely new category.

question: Description of recycling process
description: Describe the recycling process including key steps and operating principles.

question: Safety considerations (environment & human)
description: Any concerns on human health or environmental impact — toxic substances used or generated as by-products during processing.

question: Batch-to-batch consistency
description: Provide batch quality data, performance consistency data for raw materials and final parts.

question: Current scale
description: e.g. industrial scale (40000 ton/year)

question: Technical Data Sheet
description: Name of the document with hyperlink to it.
